title: Dénonciation siamoise du traité

pages.text:
Ambassade de France

Baagkok

No. d'enregistrement i

Date de reception

54

2

NOV 1967

Classement

No. 0603/32390

Ministry of Foreign Affairs,

Saranrom Palace, 2oth. November

: B.E. 2510.

Excellency,

I have the honour to refer to the Treaty of

Friendship, Commerce and Navigation between Thailand and

France, signed at Bangkok on December 7, 1937, and to inform

Your Excellency that, in accordance with the provisions of its Article 23, His Majesty's Government has decided to denounce the said Treaty which will, accordingly, continue in force until the expiry of twelve months as from to-day's date.

His Majesty's Government is willing, however,

to enter into discussions with your Government regarding the conclusion of a new Treaty of Friendship, Commerce and

Navigation between our two countries.

Accept, Excellency, the renewed assurance of

my highest consideration.

T2. Khona

Minister of Foreign Affairs.

His Excellency

Monsieur Achille Clarac,

Ambassador Extraordinary and

Plenipotentiary of the

Republic of France,

BANGKOK.
